what: why held-out QA generalization fails at this scale (informs blueprint section 5)

scramble_experiment.decision: shipped fresh-only base (P_SCRAMBLE=0): SFT 16/16 in budget, purest hero; scramble kept as code path

held_out_probes_all_zero: fresh base + answer-line fresh aug 16/60 demos: 0/30
mechanism: answering an un-demoed question requires copying the entity name from the question prefix into the answer; a fixed-window MLP with no attention must learn position-specific copy mappings, which <=60 demos cannot teach. Base fact recall itself survives the demo geometry only partially (5/30 fresh base).
consequence_for_page: quiz demonstrated facts in the live demo; reframe 'held-out animals' as an honest negative at toy scale (contrast with LIMA at real scale) or drop it
